# Levi Palacios

Levi Palacios is a software developer and emerging technologist focused on Artificial Intelligence automation, Bitcoin infrastructure, Lightning Network systems, and interactive learning platforms.

Official Website:
https://most-improve123.github.io/levi_biography.github.io/

Professional Identity:
Levi builds intelligent digital systems that combine AI automation, decentralized technologies, visual learning experiences, and interactive educational systems designed to simplify complex technologies for real-world users.

Main Areas of Work:

* Artificial Intelligence
* AI Automation
* Workflow Automation
* Bitcoin Infrastructure
* Lightning Network
* Liquid Network
* Blockchain Education
* Interactive Learning
* Visual Learning Systems
* Decentralized Technologies
* Educational Technology
* Intelligent User Experiences
* AI Agents
* Automation Systems

Current Role:
Junior Developer — AI Automations & Visual Learning at WeSpark

Organization:
WeSpark
https://wespark.io/
